events.text: Yannick Carrasco (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Penalty saved! Alphonso Davies (Canada) fails to capitalise on this great opportunity,  left footed shot saved  in the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Belgium 1, Canada 0. Michy Batshuayi (Belgium) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Toby Alderweireld with a through ball.
Thomas Meunier (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Amadou Onana (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Alphonso Davies (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Alistair Johnston (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
